untranslatable_reason: Diamond Top pattern detection requires visual pattern recognition (specific candlestick formation with diamond shape). This cannot be expressed using only price/technical indicators without explicit pattern detection logic. Additionally, the regime-dependent entry logic (breakout direction varies by yearly price position and market context) requires conditional branching not supported in this schema. The signal also lacks explicit entry trigger conditions beyond 'pattern completion' which requires pattern-matching algorithms unavailable in the allowed indicators.
translation_notes: Signal is inherently pattern-based and context-dependent. The allowed indicators are insufficient to detect the diamond top formation itself. To implement this signal, a custom pattern detector would be required. The performance metrics (27-36% average move, 69% bear success rate) and modifiers (breakout gap presence, throwback pullback, yearly price position) are documented but cannot be operationalized without pattern-matching capability. Placeholder conditions using pivot point reversal are provided as a rough approximation only.
